title: erigeron nauseosus
intro: Erigeron nauseosus, also known as Sea Blush or Erigeron, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Erigeron nauseosus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsules or as a powder for its medicinal properties to be fully utilized.
